---
title: "Interactive Shiny App"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## <https://kathleen-juarez.github.io/CEP-dashboard/CEP_dashboard.html>

<https://kathleen-juarez.github.io/CEP-dashboard/shiny-app.html>

``` r
#install.packages("shiny")
#install.packages("shinydashboard")
#install.packages("plotly")
#install.packages("DT")

library("tidyverse")
library("shiny")
library("shinydashboard")
library("plotly")
library("DT")
```

## Shiny App Template

```{r}
library(shiny)

# Define UI for application that draws a histogram
ui <- fluidPage(

    
# Define server logic required to draw a histogram
server <- function(input, output) {
  
# Run the application 
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

```

## Page layout functions

fluidPage()

fixedPage()

navbarPage()

fillPage()

# Layout Org Functions

-help arrange UI elements in the page

sidebarLayout()

vertical Layout()

splitLayout()

flowLayout()
